positive: A symmetrical, stylized depiction of celestial creatures and flora in deep indigo and gold leaf colors. The central focus is a majestic, stylized phoenix rising from stylized constellations, surrounded by swirling galaxies, crescent moons, and luminous, geometricized vines. The composition must be perfectly centered and highly symmetrical, featuring strong, clean silhouettes against a dark background. The art style is a blend of Art Deco and Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print, emphasizing sharp lines, high contrast, and decorative patterns suitable for textile printing. Golden inks are used for accents, giving a luxurious, mythic quality. Minimal gradients are preferred; flat colors and bold outlines are key.
